name: Hugging Face Inference API
description: Run 200,000+ open-source ML models for NLP, computer vision, audio, and more — free tier included.
longDescription: Hugging Face Inference API lets you run machine learning models hosted on the Hugging Face Hub via a simple HTTP API. Over 200,000 models are available including LLMs like Llama 2 and Mistral, image classification, object detection, text-to-image (Stable Diffusion), speech recognition, summarization, translation, and zero-shot classification. The free tier runs on shared CPU infrastructure; Inference Endpoints offer dedicated GPU deployments.
pricing: Free tier with rate limits; PRO plan $9/month for higher limits
affiliateText: Need dedicated GPU inference? Deploy Hugging Face models on RunPod or Modal.
